overview.short: Jina Kanchi Jain Math, Melsithamur, is a Jain Matha that is located near Gingee, Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Jina Kanchi Jain Math, Melsithamur, is a Jain Matha that is located near Gingee, Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the primary religious center of the Tamil Jain community. It is headed by the primary religious head of this community, Bhattaraka Laxmisena Swami.

topPlaces.name: Vallam block
topPlaces.description: The Vallam block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 66 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Viranamur
topPlaces.description: Viranamur is a village in the southern state Tamil Nadu in India. It is located in Gingee Taluk, Villupuram District of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nangilikondan
topPlaces.description: Nangilickondan (also called Nangilickondan) is a village in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu. It has located between Gingee and Tindivanam road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mel Sithamur Jain Math?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mel Sithamur Jain Math is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mel Sithamur Jain Math?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mel Sithamur Jain Math?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mel Sithamur Jain Math at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mel Sithamur Jain Math?
faq.a: Stays in Mel Sithamur Jain Math start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mel Sithamur Jain Math?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallam block, Viranamur, Nangilikondan.
